title: 2Pack USB C to USB C Charger Cable 2M+3M for iPhone 16 15 Charger Cable Braided 60W, Extra Long Fast Charging Lead, Type C Cord for Apple iPhone 16 15 Pro Max/Pro/Plus/iPad Pro12.9/11 inch/Air/MacBook
features: 【USB C to USB C Cable 2m+3m】 This iPhone 16 15 cable fast charging features the latest technology to support 60W PD 3.0 fast charging. The iPhone 16 15 can be charged from 0% to 50% in just 30 minutes. A Type C charger cable can be used as a high-speed data lead. Data transfer speed is increased to 480 Mbps, Gigabit file transfer in one second.

【Safe and Reliable】 The USBC to USBC cable fast charging meets electronic safety certification; the intelligent chip automatically adjusts to the current required by your mobile device for fast, safe, and stable charging of iPad devices; and it automatically stops charging after a full charge to ensure safe charging and extend service life.

【Superior Durability】 Type C to Type C cable fast charging is certified by Apple MFi and features a nylon-braided outer layer that is more abrasion-resistant than typical TPE materials. Each iPhone 15 charging cable has passed more than 20,000 bending life and strong bearing capacity tests, making it sturdy and durable without winding. The high-quality copper wire core provides greater charging stability and efficiency and protects against overheating, overcharging, and short circuits.

【Compatible Devices】 This C to C charger cable fast charge is compatible with virtually all USB-C devices, including mobile phones, tablets, and laptops. iPhone 15 Pro Max charger cable compatible with 16/16 Pro/16 Pro Max/16 Plus/15/15 Pro/15 Pro Max/15 Plus/MacBook Air 13inch/MacBook Air 2018, Mac Book Retina 12 inch/MacBook Pro 2016/iPad Pro 12. 9 inch/6th/5th/4th/3rd generation/iPad Air 5th/4th, iPad Mini 6, iPad 10, Samsung Galaxy S24, S24+Ultra, S23, S22, S21, S20, S10, Google Pixel 7 Pro, 7, 6a, 6 Pro, 6.

【Quality Service】 You will receive 2 packs of different lengths of USB-C to USB-C charger cable (2 m + 3 m) for easy charging. The extra-long iPhone 15 charger cable is suitable for many scenarios; don't worry about it being too long or too short. If you have any questions about this USB-C cable, please feel free to contact us.
description: Product Description Durable Than TPU This USB-C charger cable is braided with 48 strands of nylon material. This braided design greatly increases durability. High Load Capacity The USBC to USBC cable has passed the 20 kg load test and will last longer and never break. Tighter Connection The USB C charger cable is designed with a sturdy one-piece connector that fits perfectly into the USB-C device interface, making a tight connection that is not easy to loosen Bend Life The iPhone 15 fast charger cable cable withstands everyday bending and twisting. It has been tested to 20,000+ bends and lasts far longer than most cables on the market. Compatible Device
